final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand identity style guide for "染秋 (RAN QIU)", a Chinese autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: brand identity style guide / color and typography specification sheet
Composition: 
Subject: brand color palette (primary + secondary colors) and typography guidelines for "染秋 (RAN QIU)"
Scene/backdrop: clean presentation layout for brand guidelines
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: warm autumn tones inspired by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaves, amber
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 染秋, RAN QIU, 桂花乌龙, 琥珀枫叶, 柿霜暮色
Constraints: must show primary color, secondary colors, and font specifications clearly labeled
Avoid:
